facilities.name: Used Oil and Tire Recycling Center
facilities.hours: Bryan posts current Used Oil and Tire Recycling Center hours on its recycling programs page. Confirm before visiting.
facilities.fees: Residential drop-off is generally free for qualifying Bryan customers. Confirm current limits before arrival.
facilities.rules: Bring proof of Bryan residency or service if required, and use the city page to confirm current quantity limits before driving.

facilities.name: Twin Oaks Landfill
facilities.hours: Check Twin Oaks Landfill for current gate hours before visiting.
facilities.fees: Landfill fees vary by load type, weight, and waste class. Confirm current rates before arrival.
facilities.rules: Use the operator page to confirm accepted loads, payment methods, and any resident or account requirements before driving.

facilities.name: Twin Oaks Landfill Used Motor Oil and Oil Filter Drop-Off
facilities.hours: Bryan notes that Twin Oaks Landfill accepts used motor oil and oil filters during normal business hours. Confirm before visiting.
facilities.fees: Used motor oil and oil filter drop-off is generally free for qualifying household quantities. Confirm current limits before arrival.
not_accepted: Materials outside posted household program rules
facilities.rules: Use the Bryan recycling programs page to confirm accepted quantities and any preparation requirements before driving.
